color.grading_style: Clean & Chic, 섀도우에 시안 톤 추가

composition.composition_rule: 삼분할 법칙, 리딩 라인, 네거티브 스페이스

texture.detail_rendering: 경광을 통해 식재료와 배경의 질감을 극대화

improvement_notes: 조명을 연광으로 바꾸고 반사판을 사용하여 부드러운 분위기 연출. 화이트밸런스를 웜톤으로 조정하고 채도를 높여 생동감 부여. 카메라 앵글을 낮추거나 소품을 추가하여 역동성과 스토리텔링 강화.
nano_banana_prompt: A minimalist fine-dining dish of [Your Food Here], meticulously plated in a matte pastel pink ceramic bowl. The scene is set on a light gray concrete surface with a darker, textured blue-gray concrete wall in the background. The lighting is the key: a single, direct, hard light source from a high 10 o'clock angle, casting a long, sharp, dramatic diagonal shadow across the frame. High-angle shot, 85mm lens style, shallow depth of field (f/4). The color palette is a sophisticated mix of cool grays, pastel pink, and vibrant food colors. The overall mood is modern, elegant, and refined, with a color grade reminiscent of Kodak Portra 400 film. --style raw --ar 4:5
